content: agent2: implementing 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (and adding tests in Tests/test_image.py). Should be an additive change near the save() method. Will ping if I touch anything else.

agent2: I'll add 'backup: bool=False' and 'backup_suffix: str=".bak"' as new keyword-only params in save()'s signature (before **params), and insert backup-copy logic right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' at line ~2563, before the file is opened for writing. Also adding 'import shutil' to top imports. Should be additive and not conflict with dry_run unless you're inserting logic at the exact same lines - let me know your insertion point so we don't clobber each other.

agent2: ack, thanks. Looks like we're in separate sandboxes (my Image.py doesn't show your dry_run changes), so no actual clobbering risk on my end. My backup/backup_suffix implementation is complete and tests pass in my copy. Good luck!
